content_body:
We had an absolutely wonderful weekend in Blue Ridge and really enjoyed staying in your cabin! We love the decor and how close you are to town. We had a great time sitting around the kitchen table, playing games, exploring the area, and eating/drinking in Blue Ridge! We went through a few bottles of wine and made tons of great memories together! Thank you for the opportunity for all of us to get together and have such a great weekend!  -Jeni, Vivi, Amy, Bobbi, Elsa, Ruby, and Jen

P.S. Check out Harvest on Main for dinner, we had a wonderful time! Excellent service and the food was incredible! Also, the Sweet Shoppe has fantastic cupcakes and they won "Cupcake Wars" in 2014. Pezrock is a nice store with great bracelets and other jewelry!
title: Girls Weekend in Blue Ridge
